purpose: Show how local real-shaped export fields may be classified before ingestion.

field_classifications.sanitization_requirement: replace real identifier with stable fake identifier before commit
field_classifications.rationale: Source-native account identifier is explicit structured evidence.

field_classifications.sanitization_requirement: replace real domain with fake domain before commit unless already approved as public sample data
field_classifications.rationale: Website can provide domain evidence when an approved deterministic matching rule uses it.

field_classifications.sanitization_requirement: remove private text and replace with fake summary before commit
field_classifications.rationale: Free text may help reviewers understand context, but it must not become hard truth.
The value is a source-system interpretation and must remain traceable as derived evidence.

field_classifications.sanitization_requirement: do not include values in committed examples
field_classifications.rationale: Legal notes may contain sensitive content and have no approved local handling rule.

field_classifications.sanitization_requirement: field values must never be committed or ingested
field_classifications.rationale: Tokens are secrets and must not appear in local test data or generated outputs.

field_classifications.sanitization_requirement: do not include values until meaning and sensitivity are reviewed
field_classifications.rationale: The field meaning is unclear and must remain blocked until reviewed.

example_boundaries: This file is an example contract artifact only.
This file must not be treated as executable import mapping.
This file must not contain real customer data.
This file does not approve import scripts, live integrations, CRM writes, outreach actions, UI, agents, LLM calls, or deployment work.
